ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., memory, cognitive) */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question being investigated */,
  "hypothesis" TEXT /* Hypothesis being tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "cognitive_background" TEXT /* Cognitive background of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the session belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject participating in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session this trial belongs to */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., WORD, SESS_START) */,
  "stim_file" TEXT /* Stimulus file used in this trial */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item presented in this trial */,
  "item_num" INTEGER /* Item number for identification */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the session */,
  "trial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this response corresponds to */,
  "recog_resp" INTEGER /* Recognition response (0 for incorrect, 1 for correct) */,
  "recog_conf" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the response (scale from 1 to 5) */,
  "resp" INTEGER /* Response value given by the subject */,
  "color_r" INTEGER /* Red component of color for visual stimuli */,
  "color_g" INTEGER /* Green component of color for visual stimuli */,
  "color_b" INTEGER /* Blue component of color for visual stimuli */,
  "case" TEXT /* Text case (e.g., upper, lower) */,
  "font" TEXT /* Font used for displaying the stimulus */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the subject to respond in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulus_files" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the stimulus file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., image, text, audio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type (e.g., WORD, SESS_START) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the trial type entails */,
  "trial_category" TEXT /* Category of the trial (e.g., cognitive, memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color entry */,
  "color_r" INTEGER /* Red component of the color */,
  "color_g" INTEGER /* Green component of the color */,
  "color_b" INTEGER /* Blue component of the color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fonts" (
  "font_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each font */,
  "font_name" TEXT /* Name of the font used for displaying stimuli */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Size of the font used in trials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("font_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., trial, experiment) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this result belongs to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the results */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date the results were collected */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research question */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the research question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of research question (e.g., qualitative, quantitative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_questions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypotheses" (
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hypothesis */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this hypothesis belongs to */,
  "hypothesis_text" TEXT /* Text of the hypothesis */,
  "hypothesis_type" TEXT /* Type of hypothesis (e.g., null, alternative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hypothesis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypotheses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
